originalCode:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Adapt all ECC content from Claude Code to Augment Agent

set -euo pipefail

# Color output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

echo -e "${GREEN}Starting adaptation from Claude Code to Augment Agent${NC}"

# Count initial files
total_files=$(find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" -o -name "*.json" \) 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
echo "Found $total_files target files"

# Backup count
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}Step 1: Directory path replacements${NC}"
find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" -o -name "*.json" \) \
  -exec sed -i '' \
    -e 's|~/.claude/|~/.augment/|g' \
    -e 's|/.claude/|/.augment/|g' \
    -e 's|\.claude/settings|.augment/settings|g' \
    -e 's|\.claude/hooks|.augment/hooks|g' \
    -e 's|\.claude/agents|.augment/agents|g' \
    -e 's|\.claude/skills|.augment/skills|g' \
    -e 's|\.claude/rules|.augment/rules|g' \
    -e 's|HOMUNCULUS_DIR = Path\.home() / "\.claude" / "homunculus"|HOMUNCULUS_DIR = Path.home() / ".augment" / "homunculus"|g' \
    {} +
echo "✓ Directory paths updated"

echo -e "\n${YELLOW}Step 2: CLAUDE.md → AGENTS.md (project config contexts)${NC}"
find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" \) \
  -exec sed -i '' \
    -e 's/CLAUDE\.md/AGENTS.md/g' \
    -e "s/'CLAUDE\.md'/'AGENTS.md'/g" \
    -e 's/"CLAUDE\.md"/"AGENTS.md"/g' \
    {} +
echo "✓ CLAUDE.md references updated"

echo -e "\n${YELLOW}Step 3: Claude Code → Augment Agent (harness references)${NC}"
# Preserve: "Claude API", "Claude model", "Anthropic Claude", SDK references, claude-sonnet
find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" \) \
  -exec sed -i '' \
    -e 's/Claude Code/Augment Agent/g' \
    {} +
echo "✓ Harness name updated"

echo -e "\n${YELLOW}Step 4: Variable name updates in scripts${NC}"
# Update shell/python variable names
find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" -o -name "*.py" \) \
  -exec sed -i '' \
    -e 's/CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/AUGMENT_PROJECT_DIR/g' \
    -e 's/\$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/$AUGMENT_PROJECT_DIR/g' \
    {} +
echo "✓ Variable names updated"

echo -e "\n${GREEN}Adaptation complete!${NC}"

# Verification
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}Verification checks:${NC}"

# Check for preserved patterns
preserved_count=$(find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f -name "*.md" -exec grep -l "Claude API\|Claude model\|Anthropic Claude\|@anthropic-ai/sdk\|claude-sonnet" {} + 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
echo "✓ Files with preserved 'Claude API/model' patterns: $preserved_count"

# Check for successful replacements
augment_count=$(find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f -name "*.md" -exec grep -l "~/.augment/\|Augment Agent\|AGENTS.md" {} + 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
echo "✓ Files with Augment adaptations: $augment_count"

# Check for any remaining .claude references that shouldn't be there
remaining=$(find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" \) \
  -exec grep -l "\.claude/" {} + 2>/dev/null | \
  grep -v "CREATION-LOG.md" | \
  grep -v "historical" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

if [ "$remaining" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo -e "${RED}⚠ Warning: $remaining files still have .claude/ references${NC}"
  find skills/ agents/ rules/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" \) \
    -exec grep -l "\.claude/" {} + 2>/dev/null | \
    grep -v "CREATION-LOG.md" | \
    grep -v "historical" | head -5
else
  echo "✓ No unexpected .claude/ references found"
fi

echo -e "\n${GREEN}Summary:${NC}"
echo "  Total files processed: $total_files"
echo "  Files with Augment adaptations: $augment_count"
echo "  Files with preserved Claude API patterns: $preserved_count"
modifiedCode:

set -euo pipefail

RED='\033[0;31m'

    {} +
echo "✓ Directory paths updated"

    -e 's/CLAUDE\.md/AGENTS.md/g' \

find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" -o -name "*.py" \) \
  -exec sed -i '' \
    -e 's/CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/AUGMENT_PROJECT_DIR/g' \
    -e 's/\$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/$AUGMENT_PROJECT_DIR/g' \
    {} +
echo "✓ Variable names updated"

echo -e "\n${GREEN}Adaptation complete!${NC}"

# Verification
echo -e "\n${YELLOW}Verification checks:${NC}"

# Check for preserved patterns
preserved_count=$(find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f -name "*.md" -exec grep -l "Claude API\|Claude model\|Anthropic Claude\|@anthropic-ai/sdk\|claude-sonnet" {} + 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
echo "✓ Files with preserved 'Claude API/model' patterns: $preserved_count"

# Check for successful replacements
augment_count=$(find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f -name "*.md" -exec grep -l "~/.augment/\|Augment Agent\|AGENTS.md" {} + 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
echo "✓ Files with Augment adaptations: $augment_count"

# Check for any remaining .claude references that shouldn't be there
remaining=$(find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" \) \
  -exec grep -l "\.claude/" {} + 2>/dev/null | \
  grep -v "CREATION-LOG.md" | \
  grep -v "historical" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')

if [ "$remaining" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo -e "${RED}⚠ Warning: $remaining files still have .claude/ references${NC}"
  find skills/ agents/ rules/ skill-library/ -type f \( -name "*.md" -o -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" \) \
    -exec grep -l "\.claude/" {} + 2>/dev/null | \

else
  echo "✓ No unexpected .claude/ references found"
fi

echo -e "\n${GREEN}Summary:${NC}"
echo "  Total files processed: $total_files"
echo "  Files with Augment adaptations: $augment_count"
